projects.title: Anzen Smart Door Lock System
projects.shortDescription: Real-time IoT security system with dual-mode authentication: facial recognition and cryptographically secure one-time QR guest passes, running on a Raspberry Pi edge node.
projects.story: The Raspberry Pi acts as the edge brain: it processes webcam frames, runs 128-dimension face encodings via face_recognition/dlib, scans QR codes with pyzbar, and drives a 12V solenoid lock through an active-low 5V relay on GPIO 17 using gpiozero. Everything syncs in real time through Firebase Realtime Database with a React 19 + TypeScript + Vite admin dashboard and a Capacitor-wrapped Android app.
funFacts: Face recognition runs on every 3rd frame with frames resized to 25% and the 'small' model for 5x faster processing on the Pi.
A background daemon thread sweeps and invalidates expired guest tokens every 60 seconds.
The solenoid must never be wired to GPIO directly — its current draw would instantly fry the Pi, so a 3S LiPo battery drives it through an optocoupler relay.
Firebase logging runs in an asynchronous background thread so database writes never block the camera loop.

projects.title: Bank Customer Churn Intelligence
projects.shortDescription: Interactive Streamlit dashboard predicting bank customer churn with Gradient Boosting models, featuring real-time predictions and a dual-theme glassmorphism UI.
projects.story: Two pre-trained Gradient Boosting classifiers — a base model and a SMOTE-optimized model for class imbalance — are compared side by side with ROC curves, precision-recall curves, and confusion matrices. The predictor shows churn probability on an animated circular gauge with color-coded risk badges, backed by full EDA: churn by product count, demographics, KDE distributions, correlation heatmaps, and feature importance rankings.
funFacts: The dashboard has full dark/light dual theming with glassmorphism cards — even the Matplotlib charts adapt to the selected theme.
Trained on a dataset of 10,000 bank customers with 10 input features from credit score to estimated salary.
Includes an interactive data explorer with filters by churn status, country, and age range.

projects.title: PhisInc — Phishing URL Detection System
projects.shortDescription: Streamlit web app that detects phishing websites in real time by extracting 30 security features from any URL and classifying it with a Gradient Boosting model.
projects.story: PhisInc analyzes a URL across four feature categories — address bar signals, abnormal URL patterns, HTML & JavaScript behavior, and domain reputation — covering everything from IP-based domains and URL shorteners to hidden iframes, disabled right-click, WHOIS domain age, and Google indexing. Results are shown instantly with a visual confidence indicator in a dark glassmorphic, fully bilingual (Indonesian) interface.
funFacts: Extracts exactly 30 security indicators per URL, from the '@' symbol trick to status-bar manipulation via JavaScript.
Uses BeautifulSoup4, Requests, python-whois, and lxml to scrape and analyze live page content and domain registration data.
The interface is presented in Bahasa Indonesia with standard industry terminology.

projects.title: Attention Recovery with Neuro-Cognitive Indicators
projects.shortDescription: Ongoing research at BINUS investigating neuro-cognitive indicators for measuring and facilitating attention recovery using computational analysis methods.
projects.story: University research project exploring how neuro-cognitive signals can indicate and support attention recovery, analyzed through computational methods.
